labels.analysis: The OpenDota API Server provides extensive access to Dota 2 game data, including real-time statistics, match information, player profiles, and professional player insights. Its core functionality revolves around retrieving and analyzing Dota 2 data through a standardized API interface. The available tools enable users to fetch detailed information about players, matches, heroes, teams, and rankings. This server is particularly useful for game analytics,_player tracking, and enabling AI assistants to parse Dota 2-related data.
labels.reasoning: The primary label "Gaming" was chosen because the server's core functionality is centered around Dota 2 game data, which falls under gaming-related tools. The secondary label "Data Analysis & Processing" was selected because many of the tools involve statistical analysis and data processing of game information. The custom label "Dota 2 Analytics" was created to specifically describe the server's unique focus on Dota 2 data retrieval and analysis, as this is not fully captured by the predefined categories.

tools.name: get_player_by_id
tools.description:
Get a player's information by their account ID.

    Args:
        account_id: The player's Steam32 account ID

    Returns:
        Player information including rank, matches, and statistics

tools.name: get_player_recent_matches
tools.description:
Get recent matches played by a player.

    Args:
        account_id: Steam32 account ID of the player
        limit: Number of matches to retrieve (default: 5)

    Returns:
        List of recent matches with details

tools.name: get_match_data
tools.description:
Get detailed data for a specific match.

    Args:
        match_id: ID of the match to retrieve

    Returns:
        Detailed match information including players, scores, and stats

tools.name: get_player_win_loss
tools.description:
Get win/loss statistics for a player.

    Args:
        account_id: Steam32 account ID of the player

    Returns:
        Win/loss record

tools.name: get_player_heroes
tools.description:
Get a player's most played heroes.

    Args:
        account_id: Steam32 account ID of the player
        limit: Number of heroes to retrieve (default: 5)

    Returns:
        List of most played heroes with stats

tools.name: get_hero_stats
tools.description:
Get statistics for heroes.

    Args:
        hero_id: Optional hero ID to get stats for a specific hero

    Returns:
        Hero statistics including win rates by skill bracket

tools.name: search_player
tools.description:
Search for players by name.

    Args:
        query: Name to search for

    Returns:
        List of matching players

tools.name: get_pro_players
tools.description:
Get list of professional players.

    Args:
        limit: Number of players to retrieve (default: 10)

    Returns:
        List of professional players

tools.name: get_pro_matches
tools.description:
Get recent professional matches.

    Args:
        limit: Number of matches to retrieve (default: 5)

    Returns:
        List of recent professional matches

tools.name: get_player_peers
tools.description:
Get players who have played with the specified player.

    Args:
        account_id: Steam32 account ID of the player
        limit: Number of peers to retrieve (default: 5)

    Returns:
        List of players frequently played with

tools.name: get_heroes
tools.description:
Get list of all Dota 2 heroes.

    Returns:
        List of all heroes with basic information

tools.name: get_player_totals
tools.description:
Get player's overall stats totals.

    Args:
        account_id: Steam32 account ID of the player

    Returns:
        Summary of player's total stats

tools.name: get_player_rankings
tools.description:
Get player hero rankings.

    Args:
        account_id: Steam32 account ID of the player

    Returns:
        Player's hero rankings

tools.name: get_player_wordcloud
tools.description:
Get most common words used by player in chat.

    Args:
        account_id: Steam32 account ID of the player

    Returns:
        List of player's most frequently used words

tools.name: get_team_info
tools.description:
Get information about a team.

    Args:
        team_id: Team ID

    Returns:
        Team information

tools.name: get_public_matches
tools.description:
Get recent public matches.

    Args:
        limit: Number of matches to retrieve (default: 5)

    Returns:
        List of recent public matches

tools.name: get_match_heroes
tools.description:
Get heroes played in a specific match.

    Args:
        match_id: ID of the match to retrieve

    Returns:
        List of heroes played by each player in the match

server_info_crawled.name: OpenDota API Server
server_info_crawled.overview: Provide real-time access to Dota 2 statistics, match data, player profiles, and professional player information through a standardized interface. Enable AI assistants and LLMs to retrieve detailed game data and player insights seamlessly. Enhance your applications with comprehensive Dota 2 data retrieval capabilities.
